titles.title: Resurrection Morning (We'll Have a New Body)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: On that Resurection morning When the dead in Christ shall rise (we'll have a new body) Praise the Lord we'll have a new life With the saints and you shall gather Over on the other side (we'll have a new body) Praise the Lord we'll have a new life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: By and by When the morning comes When all the saints of God are gathering home We will tell the story How we overcome And we'll understand it better By and by

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I wandered so aimless Life will be seem I wouldn't let my dear Savior in But then Jesus came Like a stranger in the night Praise the Lord I saw the light

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I saw the light, I saw the light No more darkness, no more night Now I'm so happy, no sorrow inside Praise the Lord, I saw the light

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Some glad morning When these life is o'er I'll fly away To the home of God's celestial shore I'll fly away

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh I'll fly away Oh Glory I'll fly away When I die hallelujah by and by I'll fly away

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: In the sweet by and by We shall meet on that beautiful shore I'm on my way to Canaan's Land I'm on my way (to have a new body) Praise the Lord we'll have a new life (have a new life)
